## Tags
font, text, typography, type

## Categories
files, text

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/file-type-corner)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FileTypeCorner;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FileTypeCorner { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
